markdown:
# Vehicle & Traffic Law
## Title 2
#### Article 2. Dept. of Motor Vehicles
##### § 211 — Continuity of authority

The department of motor vehicles shall be deemed to constitute a continuation of the powers and duties of the bureau of motor vehicles in the department of taxation and finance and not a new authority for the purpose of succession to the rights, powers and duties and obligations hereby assigned to the department.

*Last modified: Sep. 22, 2014*
